invariants: app/channel_router.py remains the sole routing and fallback authority.
Monitoring does not mutate priority, weight, route status, cooldown, fallback, or request routing.
compatBoundary: Provider channel and route CRUD, priority, weight, route status, cooldown, fallback, request routing, streaming, billing, manual monitor APIs, extra_models persistence/API compatibility, and retained history remain stable. fallback_from_channel_id is widened to 512 without application-level data UPDATE or DELETE, and existing values are preserved; MySQL may internally rebuild storage while applying the DDL.
nonGoals: No automatic route mutation from probe results.
